notes: Makes video handoffs seamless by keeping the active mpv surface black between Tater bumpers, programs, episodes, streams, and channel changes until the next video is ready.
Prevents the Tater Tube menus, loading labels, stale frames, and player overlays from flashing between playback items across VOD, NZB streaming, local media, Public Access, OTA, and TV modes.
Makes Back consistently return one level at a time, including nested module screens and temporary error pages, while filtering duplicate remote-control Back events.
